mapper.select: /* plcyMapper.getPlcyMgmtList */
/* plcyMapper.getPlcyMgmtListExcel */

/* plcyMapper.getPrdtTrgtList */ SELECT A.RPRS_PRDT_ID AS PRDT_ID , A.PRDT_CODE , A.PRDT_NM , C.OLD_YN , B.MNFCT_NM , C.OUT_UNIT_PRIC , '' AS NEW_CMSN_AMT , '' AS MNP_CMSN_AMT , '' AS HCN_CMSN_AMT , '' AS HDN_CMSN_AMT , A.PRDT_IND_CD FROM CMN_INTM_MDL A , ORG_MNFCT_MST B , CMN_HNDST_AMT C WHERE A.RPRS_YN = 'Y' AND A.PRDT_DT = '99991231' AND A.MNFCT_ID = B.MNFCT_ID AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = C.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND #{saleStrtDt} BETWEEN C.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM AND C.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM
AND A.PRDT_TYPE_CD = #{prdtTypeCd}
AND A.PRDT_IND_CD IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID ='CMN0045' AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND ETC1 = '02')
AND A.PRDT_IND_CD IN ('03','34')
AND A.PRDT_IND_CD IN ('04','34','45')
AND A.PRDT_IND_CD IN ('08','45')
AND A.PRDT_IND_CD IN ('04','08','45')
AND A.PRDT_IND_CD NOT IN ('10', '11')
ORDER BY A.PRDT_CODE
SELECT #{plcyTypeCd} || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_ORG_SALE_PLCY_MST_01.NEXTVAL, '00000')) AS SALE_PLCY_CD FROM DUAL

/* plcyMapper.getPlcySubsdAmtList */ SELECT A.PRDT_ID , A.OLD_YN , A.SUBSD_AMT , A.RATE_CD , A.AGRM_TRM , A.OPER_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0049', A.OPER_TYPE) AS OPER_TYPE_NM , B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC , ROUND( A.SUBSD_AMT * 0.15, -2 ) AS AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT , ROUND( B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC * 1.1 - A.SUBSD_AMT ) AS INST_AMT , ROUND( ROUND( B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC * 1.1 - A.SUBSD_AMT ) * #{instRate} / 100, -1) AS INST_CMSN , C.ORGN_ID , C.ORGN_NM , D.PRDT_CODE , D.PRDT_NM , E.RATE_NM FROM MSP_OFCL_SUBSD_MST A , CMN_HNDST_AMT B , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST C , CMN_INTM_MDL D , MSP_RATE_MST E WHERE A.APPL_STRT_DT <= #{saleStrtDt} AND A.APPL_END_DT >= #{saleEndDt} AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND A.PRDT_ID = #{prdtId} AND A.OLD_YN = #{oldYn} AND A.AGRM_TRM = #{agrmTrm} AND A.OPER_TYPE = #{operType} AND A.PRDT_ID = B.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND A.OLD_YN = B.OLD_YN AND SUBSTR(B.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM, 1, 8) <= #{saleStrtDt} AND SUBSTR(B.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM, 1, 8) >= #{saleEndDt} AND C.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} AND A.PRDT_ID = D.PRDT_ID AND A.RATE_CD = E.RATE_CD AND E.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND E.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P'

/* plcyMapper.getPlcySubsdList */
SELECT A.SALE_PLCY_CD , A.RATE_CD , D.RATE_NM , A.PRDT_ID , A.OLD_YN , A.AGRM_TRM , A.OPER_TYPE , E.CD_DSC AS OPER_TYPE_NM , A.HNDST_AMT , A.SUBSD_AMT , A.INST_AMT , A.INST_CMSN , A.AGNCY_SUBSD_MAX , A.AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT , B.ORGN_NM , C.PRDT_NM , A.SPRT_TP , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0058', A.SPRT_TP) AS SPRT_TP_NM , NVL(A.BASE_AMT, 0) AS BASE_AMT , NVL(A.DC_AMT, 0) AS DC_AMT , NVL(A.ADD_DC_AMT, 0) AS ADD_DC_AMT FROM MSP_SALE_SUBSD_MST A , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST B , CMN_INTM_MDL C , MSP_RATE_MST D , CMN_GRP_CD_MST E WHERE A.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} AND A.ORGN_ID = B.ORGN_ID AND A.PRDT_ID = C.PRDT_ID AND C.RPRS_YN = 'Y' AND A.RATE_CD = D.RATE_CD AND D.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND D.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND A.OPER_TYPE = E.CD_VAL AND E.GRP_ID = 'CMN0049' ORDER BY B.ORGN_NM, C.PRDT_NM, D.RATE_NM, A.OPER_TYPE, A.AGRM_TRM

/* plcyMapper.getPlcySubsdListPart */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.SALE_PLCY_CD , A.RATE_CD , D.RATE_NM , A.PRDT_ID , A.OLD_YN , A.AGRM_TRM , A.OPER_TYPE , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0049' AND CD_VAL = A.OPER_TYPE) AS OPER_TYPE_NM , A.HNDST_AMT , A.SUBSD_AMT , A.INST_AMT , A.INST_CMSN , A.AGNCY_SUBSD_MAX , A.AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT , B.ORGN_NM , C.PRDT_NM , A.SPRT_TP , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0058', A.SPRT_TP) AS SPRT_TP_NM , NVL(A.BASE_AMT, 0) AS BASE_AMT , NVL(A.DC_AMT, 0) AS DC_AMT , NVL(A.ADD_DC_AMT, 0) AS ADD_DC_AMT , COUNT(1) OVER() AS TOTAL_COUNT , ROWNUM AS RN FROM MSP_SALE_SUBSD_MST A , (SELECT A.ORGN_ID, A.ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST A, MSP_SALE_ORGN_MST B WHERE A.ORGN_ID = B.ORGN_ID AND B.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} AND ROWNUM < 2) B , (SELECT A.PRDT_ID, A.PRDT_NM FROM CMN_INTM_MDL A, MSP_SALE_PRDT_MST B WHERE A.PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND B.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} AND ROWNUM < 6) C , (SELECT A.RATE_CD, A.RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST A, MSP_SALE_RATE_MST B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND B.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} AND ROWNUM < 6) D WHERE A.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} AND A.ORGN_ID = B.ORGN_ID AND A.PRDT_ID = C.PRDT_ID AND A.RATE_CD = D.RATE_CD ) WHERE RN <= 100

/* plcyMapper.getSaleOrgnList */
SELECT A.SALE_PLCY_CD , B.CHK , B.ORGN_ID , B.ORGN_NM , B.TYPE_NM FROM MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST A , ( SELECT A.SALE_PLCY_CD , DECODE(A.ORGN_ID, NULL, '0', '1') AS CHK , B.ORGN_ID , B.ORGN_NM , B.TYPE_DTL_CD2 , C.CD_DSC AS TYPE_NM FROM MSP_SALE_ORGN_MST A , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST B , CMN_GRP_CD_MST C WHERE A.ORGN_ID(+) = B.ORGN_ID AND B.TYPE_CD = '20' AND B.ORGN_STAT_CD = '4' AND B.TYPE_DTL_CD3 = C.CD_VAL AND C.GRP_ID = 'ORG0043' AND A.SALE_PLCY_CD(+) = #{salePlcyCd} ) B WHERE A.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} AND B.TYPE_DTL_CD2 = DECODE(A.ORGN_TYPE, 'ALL', B.TYPE_DTL_CD2, A.ORGN_TYPE ) ORDER BY B.ORGN_NM

/* plcyMapper.getSaleOperList */
SELECT DECODE(A.OPER_TYPE, NULL, '0', '1') CHK , A.SALE_PLCY_CD , B.CD_VAL , B.CD_DSC AS CD_NM FROM MSP_SALE_OPER_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.OPER_TYPE(+) = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0049' AND A.SALE_PLCY_CD(+) = #{salePlcyCd} ORDER BY B.ETC1

/* plcyMapper.getSaleAgrmList */
SELECT DECODE(A.AGRM_TRM, NULL, '0', '1') CHK , A.SALE_PLCY_CD , B.CD_VAL , B.CD_DSC AS CD_NM FROM MSP_SALE_AGRM_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.AGRM_TRM(+) = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0053' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.SALE_PLCY_CD(+) = #{salePlcyCd}

/* plcyMapper.getSalePrdtList */
SELECT A.SALE_PLCY_CD , A.PRDT_ID , B.PRDT_CODE , B.PRDT_NM , A.OLD_YN , A.NEW_CMSN_AMT , A.MNP_CMSN_AMT , A.HCN_CMSN_AMT , A.HDN_CMSN_AMT FROM MSP_SALE_PRDT_MST A , CMN_INTM_MDL B WHERE A.PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND A.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} ORDER BY B.PRDT_CODE

/* plcyMapper.getSaleArpuList */
SELECT A.SALE_PLCY_CD , A.PRDT_ID , B.PRDT_CODE , A.OLD_YN , C.RATE_GRP_CD , A.RATE_CD , A.CMSN_AMT AS ARPU_CMSN_AMT FROM MSP_SALE_ARPU_MST A , CMN_INTM_MDL B , MSP_RATE_MST C WHERE A.PRDT_ID = B.PRDT_ID AND A.RATE_CD = C.RATE_CD AND C.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND C.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND A.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} ORDER BY B.PRDT_CODE, A.RATE_CD
/* plcyMapper.getAgncySubsdList */

/* plcyMapper.getAgncySubsdListExcel */
UNION ALL

/* plcyMapper.getPlcyAgncyAddList */ SELECT #{salePlcyCd} AS SALE_PLCY_CD , A.ORGN_ID , A.ORGN_NM , B.CD_DSC AS TYPE_NM , #{sprtTp} AS SPRT_TP FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.TYPE_CD = '20' AND A.ORGN_STAT_CD = '4' AND A.TYPE_DTL_CD2 = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'ORG0020' AND A.TYPE_DTL_CD2 LIKE DECODE(#{orgnType}, 'ALL', '%', #{orgnType}) || '%' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_SALE_ORGN_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = A.ORGN_ID AND SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} )

/* plcyMapper.getPlcyAgncyAddList2 */ SELECT #{salePlcyCd} AS SALE_PLCY_CD , A.ORGN_ID , A.ORGN_NM , '선불' AS TYPE_NM , '' AS SPRT_TP FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST A WHERE A.TYPE_CD = '20' AND A.TYPE_DTL_CD1 = 'SU'
mapper.insert: /* plcyMapper.insertSalePlcyMstCopy */ INSERT INTO MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST ( SALE_PLCY_CD , SALE_PLCY_NM , SALE_STRT_DTTM , SALE_END_DTTM , PLCY_TYPE_CD , PLCY_SCTN_CD , PRDT_SCTN_CD , APPL_SCTN_CD , SPRT_TP , INST_RATE , NEW_YN , MNP_YN , HCN_YN , HDN_YN , ORGN_TYPE , SELF_OPEN_YN , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{newSalePlcyCd} , #{newSalePlcyNm} , #{newSaleStrtDt} || #{newSaleStrtTm} , #{newSaleEndDt} || #{newSaleEndTm} , #{newPlcyTypeCd} , A.PLCY_SCTN_CD , A.PRDT_SCTN_CD , A.APPL_SCTN_CD , A.SPRT_TP , A.INST_RATE , A.NEW_YN , A.MNP_YN , A.HCN_YN , A.HDN_YN , A.ORGN_TYPE , A.SELF_OPEN_YN , #{SESSION_USER_ID} , SYSDATE , #{SESSION_USER_ID} , SYSDATE FROM MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST A WHERE A.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd}

/* plcyMapper.insertSalePrdtMstCopy */ INSERT INTO MSP_SALE_PRDT_MST ( SALE_PLCY_CD , PRDT_ID , OLD_YN , NEW_CMSN_AMT , MNP_CMSN_AMT , HCN_CMSN_AMT , HDN_CMSN_AMT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{newSalePlcyCd} , A.PRDT_ID , A.OLD_YN , A.NEW_CMSN_AMT , A.MNP_CMSN_AMT , A.HCN_CMSN_AMT , A.HDN_CMSN_AMT , #{SESSION_USER_ID} , SYSDATE , #{SESSION_USER_ID} , SYSDATE FROM MSP_SALE_PRDT_MST A WHERE A.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd}

/* plcyMapper.insertSaleArpuMstCopy */ INSERT INTO MSP_SALE_ARPU_MST ( SALE_PLCY_CD , RATE_CD , PRDT_ID , OLD_YN , CMSN_AMT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{newSalePlcyCd} , A.RATE_CD , A.PRDT_ID , A.OLD_YN , A.CMSN_AMT , #{SESSION_USER_ID} , SYSDATE , #{SESSION_USER_ID} , SYSDATE FROM MSP_SALE_ARPU_MST A WHERE A.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd}
mapper.select: /* PolicyMapper.getInstList */ SELECT DECODE(B.INST_NOM, NULL, '0', '1') CHK, A.CD_VAL, A.CD_DSC AS CD_NM FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST A, ORG_INST_NOM_MST B WHERE A.CD_VAL = B.INST_NOM(+) AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.GRP_ID = 'ORG0017' AND B.SALE_PLCY_CD(+) = #{salePlcyCd} ORDER BY A.ETC6, A.ETC1, A.CD_VAL
SELECT SMS_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS mseq FROM DUAL
/* plcyMapper.callPlcyDetail */ { CALL P_MSP_PLCY_DETAIL( #{salePlcyCd}, #{actionType}, #{userId}, #{plcyEventCd}, #{resultCd, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }

/* plcyMapper.checkSaleEventLog */ SELECT SALE_PLCY_CD AS salePlcyCd ,PROC_ID AS procId ,FN_GET_USRNM(PROC_ID) AS procNm ,PLCY_EVENT_CD AS plcyEventCd ,FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0058', PLCY_EVENT_CD) AS plcyEventNm ,STRT_DTTM AS strtDttm ,END_DTTM AS endDttm FROM MSP_SALE_EVENT_LOG WHERE SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd} AND ROWNUM = 1 ORDER BY STRT_DTTM DESC

SELECT /* plcyMapper.selectInstNomPuList */ DECODE(NVL(B.INST_NOM,''), '', '0','1') AS USE_YN, CD_VAL AS INST_NOM FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST A LEFT OUTER JOIN ORG_INST_NOM_MST B ON A.CD_VAL = B.INST_NOM AND B.SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE A.GRP_ID = 'ORG0017' AND A.USG_YN = 'Y'
mapper.delete: DELETE /* plcyMapper.deleteInstNomPu */ FROM ORG_INST_NOM_MST WHERE SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 판매정책코드 */
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO ORG_INST_NOM_MST /* plcyMapper.insertInstNomPu */ USING DUAL ON(SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND INST_NOM = #{instNom, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE ,RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 수정자ID */ WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( INST_NOM /* 할부개월수 */ , REG_ID /* 등록자ID */ , REG_DTTM /* 등록일시 */ , RVISN_ID /* 수정자ID */ , RVISN_DTTM /* 수정일시 */ , SALE_PLCY_CD /* 판매정책코드 */ ) VALUES ( #{instNom, jdbcType=NUMERIC} /* 할부개월수 */ , #{sessionUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 등록자ID */ , SYSDATE /* 등록일시 */ , #{sessionUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 수정자ID */ , SYSDATE /* 수정일시 */ , #{salePlcyCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 판매정책코드 */ )
